title: Saudia Sausage and Kebab Crumble
description: A hearty German dish featuring saudia sausage and kebab meat, topped with a crumble mixture.
instructions: Slice the onion, carrot, and potato.
In a large pan, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the sliced onion and cook until softened.
Add the sliced carrot and potato to the pan. Cook for 5 minutes.
Add the saudia sausage and kebab meat to the pan. Cook until browned.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
Mix the crumble with salt and black pepper. Sprinkle over the top of the mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes.
